title: Maximum Subarray
description: Given an integer array nums, find the subarray with the largest sum, and return its sum. A subarray is a contiguous non-empty sequence of elements within an array.

examples.explanation: The subarray [4,-1,2,1] has the largest sum 6.
The subarray [1] has the largest sum 1.
The subarray [5,4,-1,7,8] has the largest sum 23.

hints: Try to solve this problem using dynamic programming approach.
At each position, decide whether to extend the existing subarray or start a new one.
Keep track of the maximum sum seen so far and the current subarray sum.
If the current sum becomes negative, it's better to start fresh from the next element.
